\tzpentry{ID3467}{Quantum Field Strength Functional}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3467 introduces Quantum Field Strength Functional as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ \mathcal{F}[\Psi,A,p]=\int d^3x\;\Bigg\{ \alpha(T)|\Psi|^2 + \frac{\beta}{2}|\Psi|^4 + \frac{1}{2m^*}\left|\left(-i\hbar\nabla - q^* \mathbf{A}\right)\Psi\right|^2 + \frac{|\mathbf{B}|^2}{2\mu_0} + \frac{p^2}{2\rho} + \frac{\rho c_s^2}{2}|\nabla \Phi_a|^2 - g\, p(\mathbf{x},t)\,|\Psi|^2 \Bigg\}, \]
